steps: Bake slides @ 60 °C for 01:00:00 .

Turn on oven to 40 °C . Spray everything with RNase Away. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).
Deparaffinize
Target Retrieval
Hydrophobic Barrier
Protease III
Hybridize Probes
Wash

Cover tissue with AMP1 – incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP2 – incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP3 – incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP4 – incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP5 – incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP6 – incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

AMP 7 & 8 are @ Room temperature Cover tissue with AMP7 – incubate for 00:30:00 @ Room temperature . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP8 – incubate for 00:15:00 @ Room temperature . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).
Detect Red signal

AMP 9 & 10 @ 40 °C . Cover tissue with AMP9 – incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP10 – incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2). Turn off Oven!!!! Rest of protocol is at Room temperature .

Cover tissue with AMP11 – incubate for 00:30:00 @ Room temperature . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).

Cover tissue with AMP12 – incubate for 00:15:00 @ Room temperature . Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).
Detect Green Signal
Counterstain: if hematoxylin is too dark, it will mask signal; especially green).
Dry Slides. Dry for 00:15:00 @ 60 °C .
Mounting.
After baking, wet humidifying paper, warm oven and slide tray to 40 °C .
Hydrogen Peroxide
Xylene – 00:05:00 w/ agitation . Meanwhile… turn steamer on, make 1X Target Retrieval solution, turn slide warmer to 60 °C .
Fresh Xylene – 00:05:00 w/ agitation .
100% EtOH – 00:02:00 w/ agitation .
Fresh 100% EtOH – 00:02:00 w/ agitation .
Dry on slide warmer – 60 °C for 00:05:00 .
Cover tissue with hydrogen peroxide and incubate covered for 00:10:00 . Meanwhile… Boil 1X Target Retrieval solution in microwave then place in steamer.
Tap solution off on absorbent paper.

Wash in nanopure water (up and down 3-5 times then incubate for 2 min) 2X . Wash in nanopure water (up and down 3-5 times then incubate for 00:02:00 ) (1/2). Wash in nanopure water (up and down 3-5 times then incubate for 00:02:00 ) (2/2).
Transfer samples to 99 °C 1X Target Retrieval solution for 00:30:00 .
Wash in nanopure water (up and down 3-5 times then incubate for ~ 00:00:15 )
Transfer to second container of 100% EtOH in fume hood for 00:03:00 .
Dry on slide warmer – 60 °C for 00:05:00 .
Create barrier with hydrophobic pen – let dry for 00:05:00 @ Room temperature . Possible stopping point: Dry O/N @ Room temperature .
Cover tissue with Protease III for mouse or cell pellets. Protease IV for human tissues.
Incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C . Meanwhile… Warm probes to 40 °C inside oven for ~ 00:10:00 .
Wash in nanopure water w/ slight agitation 2X .
Cover tissue (~ 120 µL ) with 1X probe mix (see below). C1 probes are 1X; C2 probes are 50X. Dilute C2 probe using C1 probes to 1X.
Incubate for 02:00:00 @ 40 °C .
Wash in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 2X. Store O/N in 5X SSC @ Room temperature .
Make enough solution for each sample. 2 µL Red-B + 120 µL Red-A = 1 sample ( Light sensitive ).
Cover tissue with solution – incubate for 00:10:00 @ Room temperature .
Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 2 min 2X. Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2). Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).
Make enough solution for each sample. 2.4 µL Green-B + 120 µL Green-A = 1 sample (Light sensitive) .
Cover tissue with solution – incubate for 00:10:00 @ Room temperature .
Wash slides in 1X Wash buffer for 00:05:00 .
Rinse slides in nanopure water.
Incubate slides in 50% hematoxylin staining solution for 00:00:30 – 00:01:00 . Slides should turn purple.
Take out immediately and wash in nanopure water 3-5X . Until slides are clear.
Dip slides up and down 2-3X in 0.02% ammonia water (should turn blue).
Wash in nanopure water 3-5X .
Dip quickly in FRESH xylene
Place 1-2 drops of VectaMount on the slide.
Coverslip.
Air-dry.
creator: Jane Balster
